Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident had a weight gain 5% or more in the last month or 10% or more in last six months. -=Not assessed/no information
 0=No or unknown
 1=Yes, on physician-prescribed weight-gain regimen 
 2=Yes, not on physician-prescribed weight-gain regimen effective 4/01/2012
